zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam De Crosland於1283年出生在英國越可爾可洛素藍德 希爾時，他的父親Sir Roger de Crosland25歲，母親Phillipa Ufton22歲。他和Matilda Crossley至少有6個兒子。他去世於1365年在英國林可爾史爾享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam De Crosland于1283年出生在英国越可爾可洛素藍德 希爾时，他的父亲Sir Roger de Crosland25岁，母亲Phillipa Ufton22岁。他和Matilda Crossley至少有6个儿子。他去世于1365年在英国林可爾史爾享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Crosland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Crossland
meanings: English (Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in the parish of Almondbury, Yorkshire, named Crosland, from Old English cros ‘cross’ + land ‘newly cultivated land’.

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam De Crosland was born in 1283, in Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Roger de Crosland, was 25 and his mother, Phillipa Ufton, was 22. He had at least 6 sons with Matilda Crossley. He died in 1365, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam De Crosland est né en 1283, à Crossland Hill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger de Crosland, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Phillipa Ufton, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Matilda Crossley. Il est décédé en 1365, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam De Crosland 1283 in Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger de Crosland 25 und seine Mutter Phillipa Ufton 22. Er hatte mit Matilda Crossley mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb 1365 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam De Crosland è nato il nel 1283 nel Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger de Crosland, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Phillipa Ufton, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Matilda Crossley. Morì nel 1365, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam De Croslandが1283年にイギリスヨークシュアイアクロスランド ヒルで生まれた時，父Sir Roger de Croslandは25歳，母Phillipa Uftonは22歳であった。彼はMatilda Crossleyとの間に少なくとも6人の息子をもうけた。彼は1365年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam De Crosland(이)가 1283년 영국 요르크실르 크로슬랜드 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger de Crosland(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Phillipa Ufton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Matilda Crossley(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1365년 영국 링코실르에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Scaitcliffe, Todmorden, Lancashire, Engl: Todmorden, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam De Crosland nasceu em 1283, em Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger de Crosland, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Phillipa Ufton, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Matilda Crossley. Ele faleceu em 1365, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam De Crosland родился в 1283 г. в местности кроссланд хилл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger de Crosland было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Phillipa Ufton, 22. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Matilda Crossley. Он умер в 1365 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam De Crosland nació en 1283, en Crossland Hill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger de Crosland, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Phillipa Ufton, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos con Matilda Crossley. Murió en 1365, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años.
